nl: Find customers who have placed at least one order
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders)

nl: List customers who ordered a product in the books category
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.customer_id IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'books')

nl: Show customers who have not placed any order
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM customers WHERE customer_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders)

nl: Find products that appear in electronics orders
gold_sql: SELECT p.name FROM products p WHERE p.product_id IN (SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN products p2 ON oi.product_id = p2.product_id WHERE p2.category = 'electronics')

nl: List gold customers who ordered clothing items
gold_sql: SELECT c.name FROM customers c WHERE c.tier = 'gold' AND c.customer_id IN (SELECT o.customer_id FROM orders o INNER JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'clothing')
